properties.name: ai.llm.provider
properties.description: Active LLM provider: anthropic | openai (v0.13: 原 ai.provider → ai.llm.provider)

properties.name: ai.llm.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum LLM call retry attempts (v0.13: 原 ai.retry.llm → ai.llm.retry)

properties.name: ai.memory.max-messages
properties.description: Chat memory max messages per session (v0.13: 原 ai.memory → 同前缀，类从 chat 挪到 memory)

properties.name: ai.soul.enabled-keys
properties.description: Enabled SOUL keys and their injection order

properties.name: ai.soul.seed
properties.description: Initial SOUL seed values (only applied when soul_profile table is empty)

properties.name: ai.soul.mood.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for mood tag system (v0.13: 原 ai.mood → ai.soul.mood)

properties.name: ai.soul.mood.tail-buffer-size
properties.description: Tail buffer size in characters for mood scanning

properties.name: ai.tools.web-search.enabled
properties.description: Enable web search (v0.13: 原 ai.web-search → ai.tools.web-search)

properties.name: ai.tools.web-search.type
properties.description: Search engine type: tavily | google | bing

properties.name: ai.tools.web-search.tavily.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Tavily call retry attempts (v0.13: 从 ai.retry.tavily 内嵌)
